assets.prompt: A photorealistic scientific accession photograph of one fictional translucent abyssal shell-like specimen in a circular glass sample dish on a pale porcelain museum table. No labels, logos, watermark, people, microscope, stock-lab composition, neon, or duplicated organisms.

assets.prompt: A photorealistic museum macro photograph of one unbranded translucent gray organza sample forming a precise soft fold. Raking side light, wide crop, no person, garment, mannequin, logos, text, glitter, copied designer pattern, or glamour styling.
